title: Widget logic unit tests
description: Extend AggregatorAppTests with the five test groups mandated by the spec: (1) APIClient URL construction — threads top-5 produces correct URL; articles view=important&unread_only=true&limit=5 produces correct URL. (2) ImageDownsampler — given an oversized UIImage and a target size, the returned image fits within target bounds. (3) Deep-link parsing — aggregator://article/123 and aggregator://thread/45 parse to the correct route enum values; malformed URLs return nil. (4) Timeline builder — given 5 sample items, produces 5 entries with strictly increasing dates ~3 min apart and correct per-entry item + URL. (5) ContentSource default — ContentSourceIntent.contentSource defaults to .latestThreads. Run xcodebuild test and confirm exit 0.
acceptance_criteria: All five test groups are implemented and passing
xcodebuild test exits 0 including all new tests
APIClient URL tests cover both threads and articles query variants
Deep-link tests cover valid article, valid thread, and malformed inputs
